title.en: Zero activated a space-time treasure, and his f...

content.en:
Zero is still relatively confident in whether he can escape from Ye Tian's pursuit.

Ye Tian has the space-time transfer technique, and his speed is indeed very fast, but he has been in chaos for countless years, and there are many life-saving things on his body, and there are also treasures that can instantly move ultra-long distances, and there are also treasures that isolate time and space, shield breath, and so on.

"Wanfa Daozi, I will definitely kill you next time!"

Zero activated a space-time treasure, and his figure disappeared in an instant.

"Escaped!"

Ye Tian sneered.

Zero's escape treasure is indeed very powerful, and he can't find many traces when he uses the power of time and space to probe, and he can't track Zero.

But what Zero never imagined was that he would be able to use the Void Life Technique, and he also used it on Zero.

If you hit the zero of the Infinite Void Life Technique, you will definitely not be able to escape.

......

The other frontier.

Zero appeared here and breathed a sigh of relief.

He was going to hide for a while, and then come out when he was promoted to the True Spirit Realm.

Suddenly.

He panicked, as if something bad was going to happen.

"What's the matter, this bad feeling, could it be that Wanfa Daozi can find me?"

Zero mused.

Immediately, he used his divine sense to probe his whole body, but found no clues.

Then, he used a special treasure that could examine all traces on his body.

This is a treasure he obtained in a secret realm of chaos before, even if it is subjected to strange spells, it can be easily detected, and he has been hit by a curse without a trace before, and he has discovered it.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the secret treasure flowed throughout the body, and rays of light bloomed everywhere in the body.

Suddenly.

A breath of breath was revealed, appearing in the probing light of the secret treasure.

"It's ......"

Zero's expression changed dramatically.

He recognized it, this was the aura of the Infinite Void Life Technique, which was usually impossible to detect at all, and even the True Monarch and even some weak True Ancestors could hardly detect the imprint of this kind of supernatural power.

But under the investigation of the secret treasure, this mark was still discovered.

But if it can't be removed, this mark will always be with him, and it is useless to abandon the body, because this mark can follow the soul.

"Damn, if it's a curse, I still have a way to get rid of it, but I can't remove the magic mark of the Myriad Void Life Technique! It's definitely the mark of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi that gave me the middle and bottom, I didn't expect him to practice the weird and rare chaos magic power of the Myriad Void Life Technique!"

Zero was completely panicked.

If he couldn't lift the Myriad Void Life Technique, he wouldn't be able to get rid of Ye Tian, and even if there were more life-saving things, he would run out!

Once the life-saving things are used up, he will be consumed by Ye Tiansheng!

Moreover, he has no way to leave the Great Universe now, unless there is a True Ancestor who is willing to spend a huge price to lure him away, but in this situation, the True Ancestor does not dare to rashly lead him away!

Soon.

A flame descends, which is eternal and does not extinguish the fire.

Ye Tian is here!

"Damn, he's chasing him so quickly!"

The eternal fire extinguishing on Zero's body itself was not extinguished, and now it was hit by the eternal fire extinguishing again, and the injury was aggravated again.

Escape!

Zero kept shuttling, and Ye Tian was in hot pursuit.

In the next period of time, Ye Tian continued to chase and kill zero, killing from one end of the great universe to the other.

No matter how many life-saving things there are, it will be difficult to escape.

One day a hundred years later.

Scattered on a neutron star, his armor shattered, his whole body cracked, and the whole person was still wrapped in eternal fire, burning his flesh and soul all the time.

At the same time, his divine power was almost exhausted, his soul power was gradually depleted, and his vitality was on the verge of withering.

At this moment, Zero is truly seriously injured and dying.

Wow!

Ye Tian tore through the void and came, his gaze staring at zero.

"Wanfa Daozi, I admit defeat, I am willing to pay a lot of treasures for my life!"

Zero admitted.

"I said you would die!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

However, he had to admit that Zero was very good at escaping, and there were too many life-saving things on his body, far more than he imagined.

He didn't expect that he would hunt down Zero for a hundred years, and he hadn't killed Zero yet.

Fortunately, this is a big universe, if it is chaos, Zero is estimated to have escaped far, far away, and he will not be able to chase and kill.

It's no wonder that Zero Luck broke into the big universe and offended him.

If it is a territory as large as Chaos, no matter how much Zero dies, it will not be easy to die!

"Wanfa Daozi, I just killed some human races, I am willing to resurrect them, and even willing to give you all my treasures and even inheritance, please don't kill me!"

Zero begged for mercy again.

"No, you don't!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly killed Zero.

Another big war begins!

Soon after, Zero's body shattered completely.

"Wanfa Daozi, I'm going to die, but you don't want to be happy!" Zero laughed madly, and suddenly a black skull appeared on top of his shattered body.

"With my body, with my soul, sacrifice to the Lord of the Demons, curse the people in front of me, and I will not be able to advance to the True Spirit Realm for eternity and eternity!"

After Zero unleashed this curse, his body and soul were completely annihilated, completely annihilated, completely disappeared from time and space, and could never be resurrected.

The curse is complete!

The black skeleton pierced through all his defenses in a way that Ye Tian couldn't understand, merging into his body and soul.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian's expression changed greatly, and he saw a black skull mark appear on his body, and there was also this black skull mark in his soul, and it couldn't be removed at all.

Ye Tian felt a little bad in his heart, and after putting away the zero remaining treasures, he immediately returned to the Void Heaven Palace.

Along the way, he ignored any of the disciples who greeted him, but directly found the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, Peng Yu Heavenly Monarch and others.

Immediately, he told them about Zero's dying curse.

Who knows, they don't know this curse either.

"Wanfa Daozi, this kind of curse is estimated to be very rare, I'm afraid I need to consult Dao Ancestor!"

Swallowing Moon Heavenly Monarch said solemnly.

"Then I'll ask the teacher to respect him immediately!"

Ye Tian began to use special communication objects to contact the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

As the most valued disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor naturally immediately descended a wisp of consciousness to the Void Heaven Temple.

......

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, what are you looking for me?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked.

Ye Tian told the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor what had happened, and when the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor heard it, his expression immediately became solemn.

"Take a look for the teacher!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor carefully examined the hole marks on Ye Tian's body, and his face suddenly became ugly.

"Trouble!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor sighed.

"Master, what is this?" Ye Tian asked.

"This is a curse from the Lord of the Demons, although it is not a curse from him personally, it is just a curse issued by something that contains his breath, but it is also very difficult!"

"Demon Lord!" Ye Tian didn't understand this existence.

"Yes, it's the Lord of the Demons, a very terrible Dao Ancestor, but now he is asleep, no one knows where he is, and even I can't find him. And the curse that Zero issued is called the Evil Demon Forbidden Curse, which can't kill people, but it can destroy a genius! Once in the era of Chaos, this curse destroyed many geniuses, and it was listed as taboo by the top forces of Chaos, but I didn't expect Zero to have this kind of curse on his body!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor explained.

"Master, can't even you lift this curse?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor asked.

"It's not that you can't break the spell as a teacher, but if you do it for a teacher, it will hurt your soul and body, and your future will be completely ruined. But if you don't undo the spell for you, you will never be able to advance to the True Spirit Realm, and it will be destroyed!"

"Is there no way around it?"

Ye Tian said nervously.

"There is another way!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said: "Many of our Dao Ancestors have studied the Evil Demon Forbidden Curse and found that this curse is not a misunderstanding, it curses you to be unable to advance to the True Spirit Realm, which means that you have to stay in the Heavenly Destiny Realm all the time. But if you can break the boundary, go beyond the boundary of the Heavenly Destiny Realm, and break the blockade of the origin of the universe, then you can hope to break the curse of the evil demon, but this step is very difficult, and no one in the chaos can do it at present!"

"Master Wang's Mentor tells the disciple how to break the boundary, and the disciple is willing to try!"

Ye Tian pleaded.

He didn't want to stay at the Heavenly Monarch level for the rest of his life, no matter what, he had to try to break the boundary.

"Well, I'll tell you!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

Immediately, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor told Ye Tian about how to break the boundary, but these were all calculated and did not get any verification, and even the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor did not know if it could be realized.
